name: Diamond Genesis Drop #08 — Ruby Bridge
description:
A standing 10% discount on every Royal Ruby digital product (Starter Pack, Dispute Vault, Credit Stacker) and a free copy of any Royal Ruby Wisdom Drop NFT released within 30 days of holding.

Unlockable perk: 10% Royal Ruby discount + free Wisdom Drop on launch weeks.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
